examples: Scientists must analyze which diets cause the least fecal effluvia.
There, they remained until the horrible effluvia destroyed the life of the living victim.
Their impurity derived from their traditional occupations, such as the taking of life and the treatment of bodily effluvia.
The porters' effluvia and the emanations of rotting produce fill the air with an appalling stench, and a burden of relentless heat crushes the esplanade.
